releaseNotes:
- New Storage Manager to browse both App Storage and Device Storage in one place
- Copy, cut, paste, rename, delete, and create folders directly from the Storage Manager
- Root-aware folder picker with quick access to App, Device, and Terminal storage
- PC-style keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+S, Ctrl+O, Ctrl+F, Ctrl+/, Ctrl+G, Build, Settings, and more)
- Better compatibility with projects created on Windows by automatically fixing #include filename casing during compilation
- Smarter compile cache that stages only source and include files while automatically skipping binary files
- Improved terminal experience with a consistent dark console, better virtual keys, and smoother session handling
- Better drawer scrolling to prevent accidental opening while navigating
- Adaptive dialogs that fit better on landscape and smaller screens
- Denser file list to display more files at once
- Improved editor tab behavior for more consistent indentation
- Various fixes and stability improvements across the editor, compiler, storage manager, and terminal
